title: peucedanum graeciensis
intro: Peucedanum graeciensis, also known as Sos Lettuce or Greek Smallage, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Peucedanum graeciensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
